headline: Nasdaq Composite Eyes AI Deals, Tech Earnings and Fed but Oil Shock Looms
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) heads into Monday’s open at record territory but is kicking off the week on a cautious note, down 0.18% at the open. Mideast peace talks have slowed, and the oil price is back in $100/barrel territory. As a result, investors are returning to the sidelines amid a bevy of events including ... Nasdaq Composite Eyes AI Deals, Tech Earnings and Fed but Oil Shock Looms

headline: Johnson Controls boosts HVAC optimization through Nantum AI purchase
summary: The acquisition is expected to help the company optimize its OpenBlue digital ecosystem by enabling real-time airflow and better performance in complex environments, it says.
